home.subtitle: Learn, participate, and earn rewards through an engaging learning experience designed to keep students motivated and successful.

features.heading: Everything you need to succeed
features.body: Questify brings gamification to your institution's courses — keeping students engaged, motivated, and accountable every step of the way.

earnXp.title: Earn XP Points
earnXp.description: Every action you take earns you points. Attend classes, submit assignments on time, and read course materials to grow your XP score and unlock new milestones.

trackProgress.title: Track Progress
trackProgress.description: Real-time dashboards show your attendance rate, completed materials, and assignment scores — all in one place so you always know exactly where you stand.

joinLeaderboard.title: Join Leaderboard
joinLeaderboard.description: Every course has its own competitive leaderboard. Earn more XP than your peers, rise through the ranks, and claim your place at the top of the class.

aiLearning.title: AI-Powered Learning
aiLearning.description: Smart insights surface your strongest and weakest areas based on your activity. See where you're excelling and where to focus so you never fall behind.

howItWorks.heading: Learn. Earn Points. Climb the Leaderboard.
howItWorks.body: Every action you take earns you points — attend classes, submit assignments, and read course materials to rise through the rankings.

attendance.title: +10 pts — Attendance
attendance.description: Get marked present in a class to earn attendance points for that course.

assignment.title: +25 pts — Assignment
assignment.description: Submit your assignments on time and earn bonus points toward your course rank.

reading.title: +15 pts — Reading PDF
reading.description: Read course PDF materials on the platform to accumulate reading points.

ranking.title: Leaderboard Ranking
ranking.description: Each course has its own leaderboard. Compete with peers and top the rankings.

stats.heading: Powering our campus community
stats.body: Students and faculty across our institution use Questify to make academic progress measurable, rewarding, and transparent.
stats.errorMsg: Could not load live statistics — showing cached data.

coursesSection.heading: Explore Courses
coursesSection.body: Browse your institution's course catalogue and enroll to start earning XP and climbing the leaderboard.

admission.heading: Thinking about joining Questify?
admission.body: Connect with our admissions team and start your Questify journey today.

footer.description: A gamified learning management system that makes education measurable, rewarding, and fun. Earn XP, climb leaderboards, and watch your skills grow.
footer.newsletterText: Product news, learning tips, and community spotlights — delivered straight to your inbox.
footer.noSpam: No spam, ever. Unsubscribe any time.
footer.subscribed: You're subscribed! Welcome to the Questify community.

about.heroBody: Questify is the university's internal learning management system — purpose-built for students, faculty, and administration. It brings XP, badges, and leaderboards into academic life to make coursework more engaging without sacrificing rigour.
about.missionTitle: Make Academic Progress Impossible to Ignore
about.missionP1: Questify was built because traditional LMS platforms put administration first. Students stared at static course pages with no sense of progress, and faculty spent hours juggling attendance sheets, email threads, and separate grade trackers.
about.missionP2: We took a different approach: combine everything a university needs — course management, materials, assignments, attendance — with the engagement mechanics that actually work. XP for attendance, badges for milestones, a live leaderboard that turns studying into a shared experience.
about.missionP3: The result is a platform where students know exactly where they stand, faculty have real data at a glance, and administration can manage the entire institution from one dashboard.
about.rolesSubtitle: Questify is designed around the real workflows of students, faculty, and university administration.
about.studentRoleDesc: Access enrolled courses, download materials, submit assignments, track XP progress, climb the leaderboard, and earn badges for academic achievements.
about.facultyRoleDesc: Manage course materials, create and review assignments, record daily attendance, and monitor per-student performance with built-in analytics.
about.adminRoleDesc: Provision all user accounts, manage courses and enrollments, generate institutional reports, and oversee the health of the entire platform.
about.valuesSubtitle: Six ideas that guide every decision made in the design and operation of this platform.
about.value1Body: Every feature exists to support academic goals. Gamification is a tool, not the goal — the goal is stronger student outcomes and a more engaged campus.
about.value2Body: When effort feels invisible, motivation drops. XP, levels, and leaderboards make academic progress concrete — turning daily study into a rewarding, trackable journey.
about.value3Body: All accounts are managed by university administration. Student data stays within the institution — no third-party marketing, no external data sharing, ever.
about.value4Body: Teachers get real tools: attendance tracking, material uploads, assignment management, and per-student analytics — all in one place, no spreadsheets needed.
about.value5Body: Admins and faculty get honest, real-time data. Enrollment trends, attendance patterns, XP distribution — the insights needed to act early and act well.
about.value6Body: The platform evolves with the university. Feedback from students, faculty, and admin shapes every update. No feature is fixed — everything can get better.
about.accessBody: Questify accounts are created exclusively by university administration. If you are an enrolled student or faculty member and do not yet have access, contact your department office or the IT helpdesk.

contact.title: Contact the Helpdesk
contact.subtitle: Having trouble logging in, a missing enrollment, or a platform issue? Submit a request and the IT support team will get back to you.
contact.itHelpdeskDesc: The helpdesk handles all Questify platform issues for students, faculty, and staff. For urgent account problems (locked out, wrong role), email directly and include your student or employee ID.
contact.officeHoursNote: During office hours only. Check our
contact.beforeTicket: for quick answers before submitting a ticket.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your issue or question in detail…
contact.responseNote: We aim to respond within one working day (Mon–Fri, 08:00–16:00 CET).
contact.successBody: Your message has been sent to the IT helpdesk. We aim to respond within one working day during office hours.
contact.messageTooShort: Message must be at least 20 characters.

leaderboardPage.title: XP Leaderboard
leaderboardPage.subtitle: Track your progress and see how you rank against fellow students.
leaderboardPage.noDataDesc: Leaderboard data will appear once students start earning XP.

testimonials.heading: What Our Students Say About Us
testimonials.subheading: Don't take our word for it — here's what students, teachers, and admins at our institution have to say.
testimonials.quote1: Questify transformed how I approach learning. The XP system made me actually look forward to submitting assignments — I went from struggling to topping the leaderboard in six weeks.
testimonials.quote2: Seeing my progress bar fill up every time I attend class or read a PDF is oddly satisfying. It's the same dopamine hit as a video game, but I'm actually gaining real skills.
testimonials.quote3: The attendance tracking and assignment management tools have cut my admin workload in half. I finally spend my time teaching instead of chasing down submission paperwork.
testimonials.quote4: My students now compete to read more course materials. The per-course leaderboard created a healthy academic rivalry I've never seen from traditional grading alone.
testimonials.quote5: Managing 50+ courses and 2 000+ students used to be a nightmare. Questify's admin dashboard gives me full visibility over every enrollment, grade, and performance metric in one place.
testimonials.quote6: The personalised course recommendations are eerily accurate. Questify suggested a study path I wouldn't have found on my own — and it aligned perfectly with my thesis topic.

helpPage.title: How Can We Help?
helpPage.subtitle: Find answers about accounts, courses, attendance, XP, and settings — or submit a request to the IT helpdesk.
helpPage.noAnswerDesc: We couldn't find an answer for that. Try a different keyword, or contact the helpdesk directly.
helpPage.ctaDesc: The IT helpdesk is available Monday–Friday, 08:00–16:00 CET. Include your student or employee ID for faster resolution.
helpPage.gsQ1: How do I get a Questify account?
helpPage.gsA1: All Questify accounts are created by university administration. Enrolled students and faculty members receive login credentials (email + temporary password) from the admin team. There is no self-registration — if you have not received your credentials, contact your department office or the IT helpdesk.
helpPage.gsQ2: Can I sign up on my own?
helpPage.gsA2: No. Questify is a closed, university-internal system. Only administrators can create accounts. This ensures that access is restricted to currently enrolled students and active faculty members.
helpPage.gsQ3: I haven't received my login details. What should I do?
helpPage.gsA3: Contact your department office or the IT helpdesk directly. Provide your student or employee ID so the admin team can locate or create your account. You can also use the Contact page to submit a support request.
helpPage.gsQ4: What devices and browsers are supported?
helpPage.gsA4: Questify works on any modern browser — Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. The platform is fully responsive and works on desktop, tablet, and mobile without installing an app.
helpPage.gsQ5: How do I log in for the first time?
helpPage.gsA5: Use the email address and temporary password provided by administration at questify.edu/login. You will be prompted to set a new password on your first successful login. If you do not change it immediately, you can do so later from Settings → Account & Security.
helpPage.xpQ1: How does the XP system work?
helpPage.xpA1: You earn XP (experience points) through three main activities: attending classes (attendance XP awarded by faculty after each session), submitting assignments (XP reflects completion and timeliness), and completing course progress milestones. XP accumulates across all enrolled courses and determines your rank on the university leaderboard.
helpPage.xpQ2: What is the leaderboard and who can see it?
helpPage.xpA2: The leaderboard ranks all enrolled students by their total XP across all courses. It is visible to all logged-in users — students, faculty, and administrators. It updates in real time as XP is awarded.
helpPage.xpQ3: Do I lose XP if I miss a class?
helpPage.xpA3: Missing a class means you do not earn attendance XP for that session, but your previously earned XP is never removed. XP can only increase over time.
helpPage.xpA4: Yes. Badges you earn — for completing courses, reaching XP milestones, or achieving a top leaderboard rank — are permanently displayed on your profile and cannot be removed.
helpPage.xpQ5: I think my XP is incorrect. What should I do?
helpPage.xpA5: First, check the XP breakdown in your individual course pages. If the XP shown does not match your attendance or assignment records, contact the relevant faculty member. If the issue persists across multiple courses or appears system-wide, submit a request to the IT helpdesk.
helpPage.caQ1: How do I get enrolled in a course?
helpPage.caA1: Course enrollment is managed by university administration. Students are enrolled in their registered courses by admin as part of the semester setup process. You cannot self-enrol. If a course is missing from your dashboard, contact the admin team.
helpPage.caQ2: How long do I have access to a course?
helpPage.caA2: Access is active while you are enrolled and the course is running. Once a semester ends and the course is closed by administration, your access depends on institutional policy. If you need to revisit past course materials, contact the IT helpdesk.
helpPage.caA3: Yes. Any files uploaded by faculty — PDFs, slides, reading materials — can be downloaded directly from the course materials section. There is no restriction on downloading content from your enrolled courses.
helpPage.caA4: Faculty post assignments with descriptions and deadlines. You submit your work directly through the Questify platform from the assignment detail page. Once submitted, faculty review and grade the work. Grades and XP are reflected in your course progress dashboard.
helpPage.caA5: Resubmission depends on whether the faculty member has closed the assignment. If the deadline has not passed and the assignment is still open, you can submit again from the same assignment page. Contact your faculty member if you need special consideration.
helpPage.atA1: Attendance is marked by faculty members for each class session. After a session, the teacher records which students were present. Students do not self-report attendance — this ensures accurate records.
helpPage.atQ2: Where can I see my attendance record?
helpPage.atA2: Your attendance history is visible inside each enrolled course. Navigate to the course page and look for the Attendance section. You will see a list of sessions with present/absent status for each.
helpPage.atQ3: My attendance record seems wrong. What should I do?
helpPage.atA3: If you believe a session was incorrectly marked as absent, contact the faculty member who teaches that course. They can update the attendance record on their end. For unresolved disputes, escalate to the department administration.
helpPage.atA4: Yes. Each attended session earns attendance XP as set by the faculty member for that course. Absent sessions earn no XP for that session, but past earned XP is never deducted.
helpPage.acQ1: How do I change my password?
helpPage.acA1: Go to Settings → Account & Security and use the 'Change Password' section. You will need to enter your current password to confirm the change. Choose a strong password and keep it private.
helpPage.acQ2: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
helpPage.acA2: Questify does not support self-service password resets. On the login page, the 'Forgot password?' link will prompt you to contact the administration team. Reach out to the IT helpdesk or your department office with your student/employee ID and they will reset your password.
helpPage.acQ3: How do I update my profile information?
helpPage.acA3: Navigate to your Profile page from the sidebar. You can update your display name and other personal details there. Your email address is tied to your university account and can only be changed by administration.
helpPage.acQ4: How do I switch between dark mode and light mode?
helpPage.acA4: Use the theme toggle in the top navigation bar, or go to Settings → Display and select your preferred theme. Your choice is saved and applies across all sessions.
helpPage.acQ5: Can I change my language to Norwegian?
helpPage.acA5: Yes. Go to Settings → Display and select your preferred language. Questify supports English and Norwegian (Bokmål). The interface updates immediately after you change the language setting.
